scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @windels/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @windels/web build
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,magenta "corepack pnpm --filter @windels/api dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @windels/web dev"
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d postgres redis mailpit
scripts.format: prettier --write --ignore-unknown README.md CONTRIBUTING.md SESSION_TRACKER.md .env.example .editorconfig .dockerignore .gitignore .prettierignore .prettierrc.json docker-compose.yml eslint.config.mjs package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json .github apps docs infra
scripts.format:check: prettier --check --ignore-unknown README.md CONTRIBUTING.md SESSION_TRACKER.md .env.example .editorconfig .dockerignore .gitignore .prettierignore .prettierrc.json docker-compose.yml eslint.config.mjs package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json .github apps docs infra
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @windels/api test && corepack pnpm --filter @windels/web test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @windels/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @windels/web typecheck
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm format:check && corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
